# Generate Feature Specification

Convert the provided notes/brainstorm into a structured feature specification markdown document.

## Structure Output As

# Feature Name

## Objective

## Problem Statement

## User Story

## Functional Requirements

## Edge Cases

## Acceptance Criteria

## Technical Considerations

## Open Questions

## Instructions

- Infer and reorganize content into the sections above.
- Fill sections only when relevant.
- Preserve all technical/product details.
- Make the result actionable for engineering implementation.
- Return markdown only.
